	FixHasKeyTa

        before=any+
        trailer< '.' 'has_key' >
        trailer<
            '('
            ( not(arglist | argument<any '=' any>) arg=any
            | arglist<(not argument<any '=' any>) arg=any ','>
            )
            ')'
        >
        after=any*
    >
    |
    negation=not_test<
        'not'

            before=any+
            trailer< '.' 'has_key' >

                '('

                | arglist<(not argument<any '=' any>) arg=any ','>

            >
        >
    >
    c
